attempts.script_preview:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 20 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 10 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 10 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type BLUE_GROUND_VEHICLE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 20 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor search_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      maximum_range 20 nm
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         power 10 kw
         pulse_width 1.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 1000 hz
         frequency 3000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor task_mgr WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type RED_TARGET WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0.1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform blue_unit BLUE_GROUND_VEHICLE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.670n 104.070e altitude 0 m msl speed 10 m/sec
      position 30.690n 104.110e altitude 0 m msl speed 10 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor search_radar
      on
   end_sensor
   edit processor task_mgr
      advanced_behavior_tree
         selector
            behavior_node planned_route
            behavior_node choose_tree
         end_selector
      end_advanced_behavior_tree

script_text:
script_interface
   debug
end_script_interface

antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
   constant_pattern
      peak_gain 20 dB
      azimuth_beamwidth 10 deg
      elevation_beamwidth 10 deg
   end_constant_pattern
end_antenna_pattern

platform_type BLUE_GROUND_VEHICLE WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 20 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
   sensor search_radar WSF_RADAR_SENSOR
      frame_time 2 sec
      maximum_range 20 nm
      reports_range
      reports_bearing
      transmitter
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         power 10 kw
         pulse_width 1.0e-6 sec
         pulse_repetition_frequency 1000 hz
         frequency 3000 mhz
      end_transmitter
      receiver
         antenna_pattern SEARCH_ANT
         bandwidth 1 mhz
      end_receiver
   end_sensor
   processor task_mgr WSF_BRAWLER_PROCESSOR
   end_processor
end_platform_type

platform_type RED_TARGET WSF_PLATFORM
   mover WSF_GROUND_MOVER
      maximum_speed 0.1 m/sec
      minimum_speed 0 m/sec
   end_mover
end_platform_type

platform blue_unit BLUE_GROUND_VEHICLE
   side blue
   route
      position 30.670n 104.070e altitude 0 m msl speed 10 m/sec
      position 30.690n 104.110e altitude 0 m msl speed 10 m/sec
   end_route
   sensor search_radar
      on
   end_sensor
   edit processor task_mgr
      advanced_behavior_tree
         selector
            behavior_node planned_route
            behavior_node choose_tree
         end_selector
      end_advanced_behavior_tree
   end_processor
end_platform

platform red_target RED_TARGET
   side red
   route
      position 30.690n 104.110e altitude 0 m msl speed 0 m/sec
   end_route
end_platform

event_pipe
   file output/behavior_tree_demo.aer
end_event_pipe

end_time 180 sec
